scripts.build: bun run build:shared && bun run build:ipc && bun run build:renderer && bun run build:main
scripts.clean: rm -rf node_modules apps/*/dist packages/*/dist .vitest node_modules/.vite test-results playwright-report apps/main/node_modules apps/renderer/node_modules
scripts.lint: bun run lint:ts && bun run lint:vue && bun run lint:typecheck
scripts.lint:typecheck: bun run --filter '*' typecheck && bun x tsc --noEmit -p scripts/tsconfig.json
scripts.format: bun x biome format --write . && bun x eslint --fix '**/*.vue'
scripts.test:e2e: bun run build && bun x playwright test
